description_long: This is a rectangular, marble-textured toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a divided interior. The exterior features a smooth, light gray stone-like finish with subtle horizontal striations and a slightly raised base supported by four small feet. The lid has a large, rectangular mirror on its inner surface, bordered by metallic hinges. The front face displays two round knobs and a keyhole, suggesting the presence of a lockable compartment and a pull-out drawer. Inside, the main compartment is split into two sections, one of which has several parallel slots for organizing tools or accessories. The overall design is elegant and robust, suitable for both decorative and practical use in urban garages or workshops.
description: A marble-textured, rectangular toolbox with a hinged mirrored lid, divided interior, and front drawer with knobs and a keyhole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open lid, interior dividers, and the thickness of the marble-textured walls.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat lid surface and the overall rectangular shape, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the open lid, interior compartments, and the marble texture.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the open lid with a mirror, divided interior, two round knobs, and a keyhole on the front face.
attribute_handle_type: No visible carrying handle; front features two round fixed knobs for drawer operation.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Keyhole lock mechanism on the front, likely metal; no visible external latch or clasp.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Interior divided into two main sections, one with several parallel slots; one external pull-out drawer below the main compartment, all compartments appear fixed.
